semantic_matched_intents.quote: Be concise in your explanations - focus on what's important rather than explaining obvious details.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already provides short, direct answers and avoids explaining obvious details by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: You must only create documentation files if explicitly requested by the user.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not write docs, README, or summary files unless explicitly asked by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Never use comments within the code itself unless there is something very complex going on.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already only writes a comment when the WHY is non-obvious by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Every change must be programmatically tested. Write a new test or update an existing test, then run the affected tests to make sure they pass.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already tests incrementally by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Every time a test has been updated, run that singular test.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already tests incrementally by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Run the minimal number of tests, using an appropriate filter, before finalizing.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already tests incrementally by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Potentially destructive operations
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already asks before destructive operations by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: NEVER create markdown files unless explicitly requested by the user.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not write docs, README, or summary files unless explicitly asked by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: After a fast-forward merge into `main`: switch back to `main` and ask the user whether the merged branch should be deleted both locally and on the remote.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already asks before deleting files or branches by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Do not delete branches silently with `git branch -d` or `git push origin --delete` — even after a merge, an open PR, ongoing review, or historical reference may still hang on the branch. Always confirm first.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already asks before deleting files or branches by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: No preamble, no trailing summary.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already avoids preamble greetings and trailing end-of-turn summaries by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Do not create markdown/doc files unless explicitly asked.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not write docs, README, or summary files unless explicitly asked by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: No /* */ blocks inside functions.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already avoids multi-line comment blocks by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Avoid over-engineering - Only implement what's requested
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Add unnecessary abstractions
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: create and coordinate tasks/agents when useful
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already decomposes non-trivial tasks and tracks progress by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: split complex problems into subtasks
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already decomposes non-trivial tasks by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Avoid excessive examples, emoji-heavy explanations, or tutorial-style comments.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not use emojis unless asked, does not explain WHAT the code does, and avoids multi-paragraph docstrings by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Essential explanations only.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already only writes comments when the WHY is non-obvious by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Remove verbose inline comments and step-by-step walkthroughs.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not explain WHAT the code does and avoids multi-line comment blocks by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Avoid multi-paragraph explanations unless absolutely necessary.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already avoids multi-paragraph docstrings by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: The body explains the why, not the what.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already focuses commit messages on WHY not WHAT by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: then create a new commit (per the Never-rewrite-history rule).
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already creates new commits rather than amending by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Never rewrite from scratch — always read existing code first, identify gaps, fix precisely
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already prefers editing existing files over creating new ones, investigates unfamiliar state before deleting or overwriting, identifies root causes, and does not add features beyond the task.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Always read files before editing
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already investigates unfamiliar state before deleting or overwriting, which implies reading files.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Do NOT commit `.env.local`
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already never commits secrets by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Run inspection, tests, and verification commands directly.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already prefers dedicated tools and runs commands itself, rather than asking the user to run them.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Do not ask the user to run local commands.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already prefers dedicated tools and runs commands itself, not asking the user to run local commands.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: When issues are completed, mark them DONE using the Linear MCP.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already marks tasks complete as soon as they are done.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Use `size() > 0` instead and add a comment explaining why.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already writes comments when the WHY is non-obvious (hidden constraint, workaround, subtle invariant). The 'why' in this context (Gson version compatibility) is a hidden constraint.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Don't explain what the code already says.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not explain WHAT the code does by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Comment only when reading the code is not enough — invariants that aren't visible in this method, cross-cutting ordering, why a non-obvious branch exists, why a seemingly redundant call is required.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already only writes a comment when the WHY is non-obvious by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: If the code is clear, no comment.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not explain WHAT the code does by default, implying no comment if code is clear.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Multi-paragraph rationale belongs in the design doc, not the source.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not write multi-paragraph docstrings or multi-line comment blocks by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Never guess or speculate.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already investigates unfamiliar state and identifies root causes by default, which implies not guessing or speculating.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Read the source code
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already investigates unfamiliar state by default, which implies reading source code.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: don't assume how a feature works based on naming or convention.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already investigates unfamiliar state by default, which implies not making assumptions.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Check the actual implementation.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already investigates unfamiliar state by default, which implies checking the actual implementation.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Verify locally first
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already plans its approach and tests incrementally by default, which implies local verification.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: run the code, start the container, execute the test before pushing to CI.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already plans its approach and tests incrementally by default, which implies local verification before pushing.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Don't use CI as a trial-and-error environment.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already plans its approach and tests incrementally by default, which implies not using CI for trial-and-error.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Don't assume directory names.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already investigates unfamiliar state by default, which implies not assuming directory names.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Say "I don't know" and investigate
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already investigates unfamiliar state by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: reading the code is always better than guessing.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already investigates unfamiliar state by default, which implies reading code over guessing.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Use grep, find, and read tools to locate the answer.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already investigates unfamiliar state by default, which implies using tools to locate answers.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Test with real data
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already tests incrementally by default, which implies testing with real data.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: when investigating runtime behavior (e.g., what model names an API returns, what directory structure BanyanDB creates), set up a local test and observe the actual output.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already investigates unfamiliar state and tests incrementally by default, which implies setting up local tests to observe actual output.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Do not commit derived files that re-introduce identifiers, and do not paste their contents into external services.
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not upload sensitive content to third-party services by default.

semantic_matched_intents.quote: Keep changes minimal. Bug fix = bug fix. Don't refactor adjacent code 'while you're there.'
semantic_matched_intents.reason: Claude Code already does not add features, refactors, or abstractions beyond what the task requires.
